name: showy_flower_vs_rest_v1
description: Binary classifier: any visibly showy-flowering species (1) vs non-showy identified species (0). Covers yellow, red/orange, and white/pink showy flowers. Species not in either list get label -1 (excluded).
notes: Probably more stable than exact red/yellow/white multiclass. Bottlebrush omitted from negative since it is in positive.
